Soroti School of Comprehensive Nursing

Unverified

Soroti School of Comprehensive Nursing is a public tertiary institution located in Eastern Division, Soroti City, Soroti. The institution provides higher education, professional training, and practical learning pathways that support career development and academic growth.

Governance and Ownership

Fees

(converted from THB to UGX)

Application Fee
A non-refundable application fee is required upon acceptance of an offer.

Seat Reservation Fee
Families enrolling in early years stages may be charged a seat reservation fee. This amount is credited toward tuition but may remain non-refundable if a student withdraws before term start.

Enrolment / Capital Levy
Families enrolling children from Year 1 onwards may pay a non-refundable enrolment fee. Some schools also offer a per-term capital levy alternative across multiple terms.

Tuition Fees (Per Year)
Moderate: This school has moderate fees in line with the local average for its sector.
